headline: A Look At Nike (NKE) Valuation As Recent Share Performance Remains Mixed
summary: NIKE stock snapshot after recent share performance NIKE (NKE) has drawn fresh attention after a mixed stretch in its share performance, with the stock up over the past week and month but down over the past 3 months and year to date. See our latest analysis for NIKE. At a share price of US$44.65, NIKE’s short term momentum has picked up with recent 1 day and 7 day share price returns in positive territory, yet longer term total shareholder returns over 1, 3 and 5 years remain significantly...

headline: Is Lululemon Stock Poised for a Re-Rating?
summary: We think Lululemon Athletica (LULU) stock is at a critical turning point: it continues to produce meaningful cash flow, but it is now trading at a steep multi-year valuation discount. Companies with healthy cash profiles can typically use their capital to fuel international expansion or support share buybacks. However, before assuming the stock is an immediate bargain, it is vital to analyze the operational slowdown and margin compression revealed in the company's Q1 earnings.

content.title: Is Lululemon Stock Poised for a Re-Rating?
content.summary: We think Lululemon Athletica (LULU) stock is at a critical turning point: it continues to produce meaningful cash flow, but it is now trading at a steep multi-year valuation discount. Companies with healthy cash profiles can typically use their capital to fuel international expansion or support share buybacks. However, before assuming the stock is an immediate bargain, it is vital to analyze the operational slowdown and margin compression revealed in the company's Q1 earnings.

headline: Why Is NKE Stock Falling Premarket Today?
summary: According to a report from Investing.com, RBC Capital Markets downgraded Nike to ‘Sector Perform’ from ‘Outperform’ and slashed its price target to $50.

headline: RBC downgrades Nike on slower-than-expected turnaround pace; shares dip
summary: Investing.com -- RBC Capital Markets cut its Nike stock rating to Sector Perform from Outperform and slashed its price target to $50 from $70, citing a slower-than-expected turnaround and few catalysts to drive the stock higher in the near term.

content.title: RBC downgrades Nike on slower-than-expected turnaround pace; shares dip
content.summary: Investing.com -- RBC Capital Markets cut its Nike stock rating to Sector Perform from Outperform and slashed its price target to $50 from $70, citing a slower-than-expected turnaround and few catalysts to drive the stock higher in the near term.

headline: Nasdaq Futures Plunge as Tech Selloff Deepens, U.S. Inflation Data in Focus
